response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be aware of the tactics that fraudsters use. Firstly, they often create accounts that appear legitimate but are actually fake. They may use stolen images or personal information to make their profiles look real. Secondly, they may use bots and automated software to spread false information or propaganda. Thirdly, they may hack into real accounts and use them to post misinformation. To deal with these tactics, it's important to be vigilant and skeptical when consuming content on social media. Check the sources of the information and verify the identities of the people involved. Also, report any suspicious activity to the platform's moderators. Additionally, use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of the information you find online. By being informed and proactive, you can protect yourself from fake content on social media.
